summary: Comprehensive frontend testing of Manager Dashboard Module (16 pages + layout). All 22 test features passed successfully. The module includes collapsible sidebar, theme toggle, and all manager pages (Dashboard, Staff, Tables, Menu, Shift, Tips, Guests, Reports, Settings) plus 7-page Loyalty sub-module.

issues: Console warnings about HTML nesting: <th> cannot be child of <span>, <tr> cannot be child of <span>. This is caused by motion.tr wrapper in table rows. Not blocking but should be fixed for cleaner HTML.

action_items: OPTIONAL: Fix motion.tr HTML nesting warnings in MenuProducts.js table - consider using CSS animations instead of framer-motion for table rows
critical_code_review_comments: All 16 manager pages render correctly with proper data-testid attributes
Sidebar navigation works with all 9 top-level items + expandable Loyalty section with 6 sub-items
Loyalty sub-nav auto-expands when navigating to /manager/loyalty* routes
Guest profile modal in NfcGuests.js and full profile page in LoyaltyGuestProfile.js both work correctly
Churn warning displays correctly for churn_risk status guests
seed_data_creation: All data is mock/static from managerData.js and managerModuleData.js
context_for_next_testing_agent: Manager Dashboard Module fully tested. All 16 pages working: ManagerOverview, StaffRoles, TablesByServer, MenuProducts, ShiftOperations, Tips, NfcGuests, ReportsFinance, ManagerSettings, LoyaltyRewards (overview), LoyaltyGuests, LoyaltyGuestProfile, LoyaltyTiers, LoyaltyCampaigns, LoyaltyRewardsPage, LoyaltyInsights. Guest IDs g1-g7 available for profile testing. Churn risk guests: g4 (Emma Wilson), g7 (Robert Harris).

1_manager_overview.details: Smart Insights Hero, 4 Quick Stats cards, Top Performance, Revenue by Hour chart, Staff Insights, Table Insights, Risk Alerts, Suggestions all present

2_sidebar_navigation.details: All 9 top-level items + expandable Loyalty section with 6 sub-items working

4_theme_toggle.details: Light/dark toggle works and persists to localStorage

6_staff_page.details: System Users section and Operational Staff section with role/status badges present

7_tables_page.details: Kanban board with table cards grouped by server, unassigned alert banner present

8_menu_page.details: Search, category filters, list/grid view toggle, margin color coding in table all working

9_shift_page.details: 5 KPI cards, Staff Earnings table, Day Performance table, Revenue vs Cost chart, AI Operations Partner card present

10_tips_page.details: Staff tip cards and tip details table present

11_guests_page.details: Guest list with search, clicking guest opens full profile modal with stats, tier progress, journey timeline, smart actions

12_reports_page.details: Period filters, Sales by Hour chart, Sales by Item table present

13_settings_page.details: Venue name input, operating mode select, currency select, integrations section present

14_loyalty_overview.details: Hero section, 5 KPIs, quick navigation cards, insights + member distribution pie chart present

15_loyalty_guests.details: KPIs, search + status/tier filters, guest list that navigates to profile page

16_loyalty_guest_profile.details: Full guest profile page with back button, KPIs, tier progress, behavior, spending, journey, smart actions, churn warning for churn_risk guests

17_loyalty_tiers.details: Point rules, 5 tier cards with colors and benefits, automation rules present

18_loyalty_campaigns.details: KPIs, filters, campaign list, suggested campaigns, create modal all working

19_loyalty_rewards.details: KPIs, filters, rewards grid with toggle active/disabled working

20_loyalty_insights.details: KPIs, all insights list, churn risk guests, near upgrade guests present

21_loyalty_subnav_auto_expand.details: Loyalty sub-nav auto-expands when navigating to any /manager/loyalty* route

22_header_page_title.details: Header shows correct page title for each route
